Transcript provenance (per plan 07 section 5, re-record on Xcode major bumps).

swiftc-error.txt
  RECORDED LIVE on this machine.
  swift-driver version: 1.148.6 Apple Swift version 6.3.3 (swiftlang-6.3.3.1.3 clang-2100.1.1.101)
  Command Line Tools only (full Xcode.app was not installed on the recording machine),
  captured with: xcrun swiftc Broken.swift -o broken 2> swiftc-error.txt

simctl-list.json         HAND-AUTHORED in the canonical `xcrun simctl list -j devices` shape.
xcodebuild-error.txt     HAND-AUTHORED in the canonical xcodebuild diagnostic + BUILD FAILED shape.
xcodebuild-settings.json HAND-AUTHORED in the canonical `xcodebuild -showBuildSettings -json` shape.
log-show.txt             HAND-AUTHORED in the canonical `simctl spawn ... log show --style compact` shape.

The hand-authored transcripts could not be recorded live because full Xcode (xcodebuild + the
CoreSimulator simctl) was not present on the recording machine; only the Command Line Tools swiftc
was available. Re-record all of them from a machine with the supported Xcode when one is available.
